name: Croissance Exponentielle
seo_description: Calculez le debit et la vitesse de l'eau dans les tuyaux selon le diametre et la pression. Calculatrice de plomberie pour le dimensionnement.
example_label: Calculezte exponential growth starting at with 3.5% rate over years.
result_context: The Final value {Final} after exponential growth over the time period.
steps: Initial P₀ = 150, rate r = 3.5% = 0.035, time t = years
mistakes: Using percentage directly instead of decimal (3.vs 0.035)
Using (1+r)^t instead of e^(rt) for continuous growth
Confusing exponential growth with linear growth
